qa_pair.question: Across every track in the project, find the one whose volume fader is set the quietest (the most negative dB value). What is that track's name?
How many tracks in the project have at least one FX in their chain?
Two different tracks route a send to the same effects bus. Of those two source tracks, which one sends at the louder level (higher dB)? Give the source track's name.
Every send in this project is routed to a single shared destination track. What is the name of that destination track?
The project contains exactly one region (as opposed to a point marker). How many seconds long is it (its end minus its start)? Answer with just the number.
Counting only point markers (not regions), how many are in the project? Answer with just the number.
What is the project's tempo in BPM? Answer with just the number.
Exactly one track in the project has a compressor (ReaComp) inserted in its FX chain. What is that track's name?
Among all tracks, find the one panned furthest to the left. What is its pan value (a number between -1.0 and 1.0)?
Exactly one track in the project contains a media or MIDI item. What is that track's name?
